    <h1 {...{
      "id": "crash-recovery-architecture"
    }}>{`Crash recovery architecture`}</h1>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "overview"
    }}>{`Overview`}</h2>
    <p>{`Content Analytics uses `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`PersistentHitQueue`}</inlineCode>{` to protect against data loss during the batching window (0-5 seconds). Events are written to disk immediately when tracked. On next app launch, any persisted events are recovered from disk into memory for processing, then cleared from disk (no data loss - events are safely in memory before disk cleanup).`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "how-it-works"
    }}>{`How It Works`}</h2>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-00%",
        "metastring": "hone",
        "hone": true
      }}>{`User tracks event
  └─> Event added to memory + disk (crash-safe)
      │
      └─> Batching (0-5 seconds)
          │
          └─> Flush triggered
              │
              ├─> Process accumulated events
              ├─> Calculate aggregated metrics
              └─> Dispatch to Edge Network (Edge guarantees delivery)
`}</code></pre>

    <h2 {...{
      "id": "detailed-timeline-example"
    }}>{`Detailed Timeline Example`}</h2>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-text"
      }}>{`Time   │ Event                                │ Memory │ Disk │ Safe?
───────┼──────────────────────────────────────┼────────┼──────┼───────
00.00s │ User views Asset A                   │ ✓      │ ✓    │ ✅ YES
00.01s │ Event written to disk                │ ✓      │ ✓    │ ✅ YES
00.50s │ User clicks Asset B                  │ ✓      │ ✓    │ ✅ YES
01.00s │ User clicks Asset B                  │ ✓      │ ✓    │ ✅ YES
       │ [Batching window - events on disk]   │        │      │
02.00s │ Timer fires → Flush triggered        │ ✓      │ ✓    │ ✅ YES
02.01s │ Process accumulated events           │ ✓      │ ✓    │ ✅ YES
02.02s │ Calculate metrics (1 view, 2 clicks) │ ✓      │ ✓    │ ✅ YES
02.03s │ Dispatch to Edge Network             │ ✗      │ ✗    │ ✅ YES*
       │ (*Edge guarantees delivery)          │        │      │

Legend:
✓ = Present
✗ = Not present
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Events stay on disk during the entire batching window. Once events are handed off to Edge, their persistence takes over.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "crash-scenarios"
    }}>{`Crash Scenarios`}</h2>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "scenario-1-crash-during-batching-0-5s-window"
    }}>{`Scenario 1: Crash During Batching (0-5s window)`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-text"
      }}>{`Status: Events in memory + disk
Crash:  ⚡ App terminated
        └─> Memory lost ✗
        └─> Disk persists ✓

Recovery on Next Launch:
1. PersistentHitQueue.beginProcessing() starts
2. DirectHitProcessor.processHit() called for each persisted event
3. Events accumulated in memory, cleared from disk
4. Normal batch processing resumes

Result: ✅ ZERO DATA LOSS
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "scenario-2-crash-during-flush"
    }}>{`Scenario 2: Crash During Flush`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-text"
      }}>{`Status: Events being processed
Crash:  ⚡ App terminated mid-dispatch
        └─> Memory lost ✗
        └─> Events may still be on disk if not yet processed

Recovery on Next Launch:
1. Any remaining events on disk are recovered
2. Re-accumulated and dispatched on next flush

Result: ✅ ZERO DATA LOSS (possible duplicate if crash after Edge dispatch)
`}</code></pre>
    <h3 {...{
      "id": "scenario-3-crash-after-edge-dispatch"
    }}>{`Scenario 3: Crash After Edge Dispatch`}</h3>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-text"
      }}>{`Status: Events dispatched to Edge
Crash:  ⚡ App terminated
        └─> Disk already cleared during processHit()
        └─> Edge has the events

Result: ✅ ZERO DATA LOSS - Edge guarantees delivery
`}</code></pre>

    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{

`}</code></pre>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Handoff Point:`}</strong>{` After `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`eventDispatcher.dispatch()`}</inlineCode>{` completes, Edge extension owns persistence.`}</p>
    <p><strong parentName="p">{`Edge Guarantees:`}</strong>{` Once Edge receives the event, it handles persistence, retries, and delivery confirmation.`}</p>

        "className": "language-text"
      }}>{`Event tracked
  └─> BatchCoordinator.addAssetEvent()

    <h3 {...{
      "id": "callback-chain-architecture"
    }}>{`Callback Chain Architecture`}</h3>
    <p>{`The SDK uses a callback chain to decouple components while maintaining type safety:`}</p>
    <pre><code parentName="pre" {...{
        "className": "language-text"
      }}>{`┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                           INITIALIZATION PHASE                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  ContentAnalyticsFactory.createOrchestrator()                               │
│    │                                                                        │
│    ├─> Creates BatchCoordinator(assetQueue, experienceQueue, state)         │
│    │     └─> DirectHitProcessor initialized with no-op callbacks            │
│    │                                                                        │
│    ├─> Creates ContentAnalyticsOrchestrator(batchCoordinator, ...)          │
│    │                                                                        │
│    └─> Wires callbacks: batchCoordinator.setCallbacks(                      │
│          assetCallback: orchestrator.processAssetEvents,                    │
│          experienceCallback: orchestrator.processExperienceEvents           │
│        )                                                                    │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                            RUNTIME DATA FLOW                                │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                             │
│  User calls ContentAnalytics.trackAssetInteraction()                        │
│    │                                                                        │
│    v                                                                        │
│  ┌──────────────────┐                                                       │
│  │ BatchCoordinator │                                                       │
│  │  addAssetEvent() │──────────────────────────────────────────┐            │
│  └────────┬─────────┘                                          │            │
│           │                                                    │            │
│           v                                                    v            │
│  ┌────────────────────┐                           ┌─────────────────────┐   │
│  │ DirectHitProcessor │                           │ PersistentHitQueue  │   │
│  │ accumulateEvent()  │                           │ queue() [disk]      │   │
│  │ [memory buffer]    │                           └─────────────────────┘   │
│  └────────┬───────────┘                                                     │
│           │                                                                 │
│           │ (on flush trigger: count >= 10 or timer >= 2s)                  │
│           v                                                                 │
│  ┌────────────────────────────┐                                             │
│  │ DirectHitProcessor         │                                             │
│  │ processAccumulatedEvents() │                                             │
│  └────────┬───────────────────┘                                             │
│           │                                                                 │
│           │ invokes processingCallback([events])                            │
│           v                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────┐                                        │
│  │ ContentAnalyticsOrchestrator    │                                        │
│  │ processAssetEvents([events])    │                                        │
│  │   ├─> Group by asset key        │                                        │
│  │   ├─> Calculate metrics         │                                        │
│  │   └─> Build XDM payload         │                                        │
│  └────────┬────────────────────────┘                                        │
│           │                                                                 │
│           v                                                                 │
│  ┌───────────────────┐                                                      │
│  │ EdgeEventDispatcher│                                                     │
│  │ dispatch()         │──────────────> Edge Network                         │
│  └───────────────────┘                                                      │
│                                                                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
`}</code></pre>
    <p>{`Callbacks avoid circular dependencies - BatchCoordinator doesn't need to import Orchestrator. Also this makes testing easier since you can inject mocks.`}</p>

    <p>{`Content Analytics batches events for 0-5 seconds before dispatch. Without disk persistence during that window, crashes would lose data. Edge dispatches immediately so it doesn't need this.`}</p>
    <h2 {...{
      "id": "known-limitations"
    }}>{`Known Limitations`}</h2>
    <ol>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`No dispatch confirmation:`}</strong>{` Extensions cannot receive callbacks from Edge to confirm receipt`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Possible duplicates:`}</strong>{` Crash during Edge dispatch may cause duplicate events (Edge deduplication handles this)`}</li>
      <li parentName="ol"><strong parentName="li">{`Memory overhead:`}</strong>{` Events held in memory + disk during batching (minimal: ~40KB)`}</li>
    </ol>

    </MDXLayout>;
}
;
MDXContent.isMDXComponent = true;
